_meta.keyKnowledge: We develop our art skills by experimenting with visual conventions, processes and materials.

_source.w: We develop our art skills by experimenting with visual conventions, processes and materials.
y: Experimentation is how we push our skills forward and discover new possibilities.
Reflecting on how art elements work builds our understanding of artistic choices.
Developing strong technical skills gives us more freedom to express our ideas.
eg: We explore how colour, tone and composition can be manipulated to express mood and emotion.
We ask 'What would happen if I used a contrasting colour scheme?' to guide our experiments.
We try new media and techniques and document our discoveries in a visual diary.
We develop our skills in a range of art forms — painting, printmaking, sculpture, digital.
We analyse how other artists use visual conventions and experiment with similar approaches.
We set artistic goals based on what we want to improve in our practice.
